stimulus: Why do some ancient Egyptian wooden artifacts, such as carved boats found in tombs, remain remarkably intact after thousands of years, when modern wooden objects often decay within decades? Conservators ______blank that the key to the artifacts’ preservation was the extremely dry desert climate, which kept moisture and microorganisms at bay.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. A main clause requires a finite (tensed) verb. The finite present tense verb “suggest” correctly serves as the main verb expressing what the conservators do.

Choices A, B, and D are all nonfinite forms that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
